requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Angola PV Inverter Project Submissions
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——安哥拉光伏逆变器项目提交的IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——安哥拉光伏逆變器項目提交的IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: No Angola-only EMC regulation specific to solar PV inverters has been identified in public official sources for this draft. In practice, EMC is usually handled through IANORQ standards/conformity review, utility or EPC technical schedules, and IEC-referenced project specifications. The relevant inverter EMC evidence commonly requested is IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and IEC 61000-series emissions/immunity evidence, including harmonic-current evidence where applicable. For grid-tied Angola projects, EMC evidence should be tied to the exact inverter model, rating, firmware, filter configuration, and operating voltage used in the project.
summary.zh: 本草案未在公开官方来源中识别到安哥拉专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立EMC法规。实际操作中，EMC通常通过IANORQ标准/合格评定审查、公用事业或EPC技术清单以及IEC引用项目规格处理。通常要求的逆变器EMC证据为光伏功率变换设备IEC 62920以及IEC 61000系列发射/抗扰度证据，包括适用时的谐波电流证据。对于安哥拉并网项目，EMC证据应绑定至项目使用的确切逆变器型号、功率等级、固件、滤波配置及工作电压。
summary.zht: 本草案未在公開官方來源中識別到安哥拉專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立EMC法規。實際操作中，EMC通常通過IANORQ標準/合格評定審查、公用事業或EPC技術清單以及IEC引用項目規格處理。通常要求的逆變器EMC證據為光伏功率轉換設備IEC 62920以及IEC 61000系列發射/抗擾度證據，包括適用時的諧波電流證據。對於安哥拉併網項目，EMC證據應綁定至項目使用的確切逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體、濾波配置及工作電壓。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions, immunity, and harmonic-current test methods as specified by the project
IANORQ conformity / standards review where applicable to imported electrical equipment
EPC or lender technical specifications for Angola solar PV projects

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly comes from GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, domestic CNAS laboratory reports, CQC/CGC certification, and China project acceptance records. These can be useful for background technical review but should not be presented as automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or project-specified IEC 61000 reports. Angola project reviewers may require test reports from an internationally recognized or ILAC-accredited laboratory, English or Portuguese certificate language, and clear model-family coverage.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常来自GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、国内CNAS实验室报告、CQC/CGC认证及中国项目验收记录。这些材料可用于背景技术审查，但不应作为IEC 62920或项目指定IEC 61000报告的自动等同证据提交。安哥拉项目审查方可能要求来自国际认可或ILAC认可实验室的测试报告、英文或葡萄牙语证书语言以及清晰的型号系列覆盖范围。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常來自GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、國內CNAS實驗室報告、CQC/CGC認證及中國項目驗收記錄。這些材料可用於背景技術審查，但不應作為IEC 62920或項目指定IEC 61000報告的自動等同證據提交。安哥拉項目審查方可能要求來自國際認可或ILAC認可實驗室的測試報告、英文或葡萄牙語證書語言以及清晰的型號系列覆蓋範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC reports do not prove Angola acceptance unless the importer, IANORQ pathway, utility reviewer, EPC, and lender accept them in writing. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter configuration, including harmonic-current evidence, conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, surge, EFT, and electrostatic discharge where the project specification requires them. Translate certificate summaries and test scope into Portuguese for Angola review.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国EMC报告不能证明安哥拉接受，除非进口商、IANORQ路径、公用事业审查方、EPC和贷款方书面接受。出口商应为确切逆变器配置取得或映射IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告，包括项目规格要求时的谐波电流、传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、浪涌、EFT及静电放电证据。证书摘要和测试范围应翻译为葡萄牙语供安哥拉审查。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國EMC報告不能證明安哥拉接受，除非進口商、IANORQ路徑、公用事業審查方、EPC和貸款方書面接受。出口商應為確切逆變器配置取得或映射IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告，包括項目規格要求時的諧波電流、傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、浪湧、EFT及靜電放電證據。證書摘要和測試範圍應翻譯為葡萄牙語供安哥拉審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by IANORQ conformity/import review, ENDE/RNT technical review, EPC project specification, lender procurement condition, or owner engineer
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China depending on certification route; China reports are not automatically valid for Angola IEC-referenced submissions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC evidence alone for Angola. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence for the specific inverter model and configuration, with Portuguese-ready summaries, and confirm in writing whether IANORQ, ENDE/RNT, the EPC contractor, and any lender will accept the report package before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要仅依赖GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC证据进入安哥拉。应针对特定逆变器型号和配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000证据，并提供可用于葡萄牙语提交的摘要；出货前书面确认IANORQ、ENDE/RNT、EPC承包商及任何贷款方是否接受该报告包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要僅依賴GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC證據進入安哥拉。應針對特定逆變器型號和配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000證據，並提供可用於葡萄牙語提交的摘要；出貨前書面確認IANORQ、ENDE/RNT、EPC承包商及任何貸款方是否接受該報告包。
